# DineOpen

> The Global Restaurant Operating System. Cloud POS, AI voice ordering, waiter apps, inventory management, and loyalty programs for restaurants worldwide.

DineOpen is a cloud-based restaurant management platform trusted by 1000+ restaurants across 20+ countries. It provides an all-in-one solution including POS billing, AI-powered voice and chat ordering, QR code menus, kitchen display systems, table reservations, inventory tracking, direct ordering channels (QR, WhatsApp, website), and customer loyalty programs.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2024
- Website: https://www.dineopen.com
- Contact: support@dineopen.com
- Rating: 4.8/5 (1000+ reviews)
- Countries: USA, UK, India, UAE, Singapore, Canada, Australia, and 20+ more
- Free Trial: 30 days, no credit card required
- Transaction Fees: Zero (only monthly subscription)

## Pricing

- Spark Plan: $9.99/month (international) | ₹300/month (India) — up to 3 locations
- Blaze Plan: $89/month — unlimited locations, centralized dashboard, cross-location analytics
- All plans include: unlimited menu items, unlimited tables, AI Agent, POS, inventory, analytics, KDS

## Core Features

- Lightning-Fast Cloud POS (bill in 3 seconds)
- AI Agent: voice ordering, chat assistant, menu extraction from images
- Waiter & Captain App for tableside ordering
- Online Table Reservations
- Smart Inventory Management with auto low-stock alerts
- Kitchen Display System (KDS)
- AI-Powered Analytics & Reporting
- Loyalty & Rewards Program
- Direct Ordering Channels (QR code, WhatsApp, website — no aggregator commissions)
- UPI, Card, PayPal payments (zero DineOpen transaction fees)
- GST-compliant billing (India)
- WhatsApp Marketing
- Multi-location support

- [Best Restaurant POS India 2026](https://www.dineopen.com/best-restaurant-pos-india)

## Key Differentiators vs Competitors

1. **AI-first**: Built-in voice ordering and AI chat assistant — competitors charge extra or don't offer it
2. **Zero transaction fees**: Unlike Square (2.6%), Toast (2.49%), Clover (2.3%)
3. **Lowest pricing**: $9.99/month vs Toast ($69), Square ($60), LightSpeed ($89), TouchBistro ($69)
4. **No hardware lock-in**: Works on any device (phone, tablet, laptop) — no proprietary hardware required
5. **Global + local**: Supports 20+ countries with localized tax, payments, and language

## Integrations

- [Razorpay](https://www.dineopen.com/integrations/razorpay) — UPI, cards, netbanking for India
- Dodo Payments — International card and PayPal payments
- Note: Zomato/Swiggy aggregator integration is not currently available. DineOpen focuses on direct ordering channels (QR, WhatsApp, website) to help restaurants avoid 25-30% aggregator commissions.

## FAQ

### What is DineOpen?
DineOpen is a cloud-based restaurant operating system that includes POS billing, AI-powered voice and chat ordering, waiter/captain apps, table reservations, inventory management, kitchen display system, analytics, and loyalty programs. It works on any device with no hardware installation needed.

### How much does DineOpen cost?
Spark plan starts at $9.99/month (international) or ₹300/month (India). Blaze plan for chains is $89/month with unlimited locations. All plans include a 30-day free trial with no credit card required, zero transaction fees, and unlimited menu items.

### What countries does DineOpen serve?
DineOpen serves restaurants in USA, UK, India, UAE, Singapore, Canada, Australia, and 20+ other countries. The platform is cloud-based with localized billing, tax compliance, and payment gateway support for each region.

### Does DineOpen have AI features?
Yes. DineOpen includes an AI Agent with voice ordering in local languages, AI chat assistant for customer support, AI menu extraction from images, and intelligent business analytics with actionable insights.

### How does DineOpen compare to competitors?
DineOpen offers AI-powered features (voice ordering, chat), zero transaction fees, and significantly lower pricing compared to Square ($60/mo), Toast ($69/mo), LightSpeed ($89/mo), and TouchBistro ($69/mo). It includes unlimited menu items and multi-location support on all plans.

### Is DineOpen suitable for small restaurants?
Yes. The Spark plan at $9.99/month is designed for small restaurants, cafes, and food trucks. It includes the full AI Agent, unlimited menu items, complete POS system, unlimited tables, and real-time kitchen display. No hardware purchase or technical expertise required.
